description: ANALYST re-proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 pending AUDITOR resolution. AUDITOR must inspect governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and all referenced workflow files on main branch and issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED to close this task and advance to the next roadmap phase, or VERIFICATION_FAILED with documented findings to trigger remediation. No further CLOUD_CODE execution is required until AUDITOR issues a decision. This task cannot advance without AUDITOR resolution.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch with pass status for all five validation checks; .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml containing dispatch role filter (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5) and PRE_ACTION_APPROVED-gated current_task.json write (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); governance/ledger/ ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 at schema v162 with correct commit SHAs; AUDITOR-issued VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED event closing this task
